notes: Lunch menu captured in full including lunch specials, nigiri (2-piece orders), and rolls; dinner menu referenced but not included in this text. Omakase page exists but contents not provided. Sea urchin and Fish of the Day are market price. Bento content changes daily. No beverage list present.

dishes.name: Sushi Combination A
dishes.description: California Roll and 7 pieces of nigiri sushi: tuna, salmon, shrimp, yellowtail, white fish, surf clam, & octopus. Served with miso soup.

dishes.name: Sushi Combination B
dishes.description: California Roll and 5 pieces of nigiri sushi: tuna, salmon, shrimp, yellowtail, & white fish. Served with miso soup.

dishes.name: Sashimi Combination
dishes.description: Albacore, yellowtail, salmon, white fish, & octopus sashimi. Served with a bowl of rice and miso soup.

dishes.name: Chirashi Sushi
dishes.description: Tuna, salmon, shrimp, yellowtail, white fish, surf clam, octopus, egg omelette, & vegetables on a bed of sushi rice. Served with miso soup.

dishes.name: Poke Bowl
dishes.description: Tuna, cucumber, onion and radish sprouts tossed in spicy sesame soy and served over steamed rice.

dishes.name: Tendon
dishes.description: 2 piece prawn & 3 piece vegetable tempura on a bed of rice covered in tendon sauce. Served with Japanese pickles & miso soup.

dishes.name: Chicken Yakiniku Don
dishes.description: Sautéed chicken & vegetables on a bed of rice. Served with Japanese pickles & miso soup.

dishes.name: Nabeyaki Udon
dishes.description: Udon noodle soup served in a hot pot with prawn tempura, clams, chicken, shiitake mushroom, vegetables, fish cake, & egg.

dishes.name: Tempura Udon
dishes.description: Udon noodle soup topped with prawn tempura, vegetable tempura, fish cake, & vegetables.

dishes.name: Seafood Yakisoba
dishes.description: Stir-fried noodles with shrimp, calamari, & vegetables.
